param.name: preset
param.label: Speed/accuracy preset
param.help: Presets adjust the compression factor (-c) for different speed/accuracy tradeoffs. Leave on default for typical bacterial genomes.
param.option: Fast (c=200) -- 2x faster, less accurate AF, OK for high-N50 / >95% ANI
Medium (c=70) -- 2x slower, more accurate for fragmented assemblies (< 10 kb N50)
Slow (c=30) -- 4x slower, much more accurate AF for distant genomes
Small genomes (c=30, m=200) -- for viruses / plasmids (< 20 kb)

param.name: preset
param.label: Speed/accuracy preset
param.help: Presets adjust the compression factor (-c). For small genomes (viruses, plasmids), set -c=30 and -m=200 manually below.
param.option: Fast (c=200) -- 2x faster, less accurate AF, OK for high-N50 / >95% ANI
Medium (c=70) -- 2x slower, more accurate for fragmented assemblies (< 10 kb N50)
Slow (c=30) -- 4x slower, much more accurate AF for distant genomes

param.label: Compression factor (k-mer subsampling rate)
param.help: Lower values give more accurate ANI/AF at the cost of speed and memory. Overridden by the speed/accuracy preset above.

param.label: Marker k-mer compression factor
param.help: Lower values (~200-300) help with small genomes such as plasmids or viruses.

param.label: Screening identity (%)
param.help: Pairs with approximately less than this percent identity are screened out by k-mer sketching.

param.label: Robust mean
param.help: Estimate the mean ANI after trimming the 10%/90% quantiles.

param.label: Use median instead of mean
param.help: Estimate the median identity instead of the mean.

param.label: Disable learned-ANI regression
param.help: Disable the regression model used to predict ANI. By default it is used for c >= 70 and >= 150,000 bases aligned.

param.label: Faster small-genome filtering
param.help: Filter genomes with fewer than 20 marker k-mers more aggressively. Much faster for many small genomes but may miss some comparisons.

param.label: Minimum aligned fraction (%)
param.help: Only output ANI values where one genome has aligned fraction greater than this value.

param.label: Minimum aligned fraction for BOTH genomes (%)
param.help: If set, only output ANI values where both genomes have aligned fraction greater than this value.

param.label: Include 90% confidence intervals
param.help: Output [5%, 95%] ANI confidence intervals using percentile bootstrap.

param.label: Detailed output
param.help: Print additional info including contig N50s and more.

param.label: Short header names
param.help: Only display the first part of contig names (before the first whitespace).
